name: salamobile
title: SalaMobile
description: Bloque Concorde SalaMobile — incluye sus 5 componentes. Se instala en concorde/.

files.content:
export { default, SALAMOBILE_WIDTH, SALAMOBILE_HEIGHT } from "./SalaMobile";

export { default } from "./BidMessage";

export { default } from "./Signal";

export { default as Button } from "./Button";
export type { ButtonProps, ButtonVariant } from "./Button";
